About Me
01 / INTRODUCTION

More than assignments.
I build things.

PHASE 01 CURIOSITY

Started exploring the fundamentals of logic, core programming constructs, and the visual layout of user interfaces.

PHASE 02 BUILDING

Mastered C, C++, and Python. Built practical automation utilities, basic games, and command-line developer tools.

PHASE 03 EXPANDING

Currently deep-diving into full-stack MERN engineering, data workflows, and core machine learning algorithms.

PHASE 04 PRODUCT THINKING

Designing end-to-end practical products that integrate clean code, user-centric design, and functional AI capabilities.

The Z Store
03 / PROJECT 01

The Z Store

Managed Offline Retail for Digital Brands

Concept: Solves the high cost of opening physical stores for digital-first emerging brands by providing shared premium space, store operations, and client reach.

For Customers: A single, high-end destination to discover, try, compare, and instantly buy products from emerging fashion brands.

🏆

First Prize Winner

₹10,000 Awarded
BITS Pilani Pitch Winner

Won first place in the cohort business pitch competition by demonstrating commercial viability and scalability.

04 / EXPERIENCE

30 Days at BITS Pilani

May 25

Bootcamp Kickoff

Intensive design thinking and problem identification modules.

June 10

System Building

Translating user interviews into coding prototypes.

June 20

Jury Pitching

Refining pitch decks, financial structures, and technical feasibility.

Luna AI
05 / PROJECT 02 // Python, PyQt5, RAG, LLM APIs

Luna AI

Voice-Controlled Desktop Assistant (Jan 2026)

• Built an AI desktop assistant capable of controlling the computer using voice, text, and terminal commands.

• Integrated speech recognition, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and system automation through an interactive GUI.

GITHUB REPO ↗
Exoplanet Detection
06 / PROJECT 03 // React.js, Python, ML

Exoplanet AI Dashboard

Transit Photometrics Analytics (Nov 2025)

• Built an AI dashboard using NASA datasets to analyze and visualize potential exoplanet detections.

• Developed interactive visualizations for astronomical data exploration.

LIVE DEMO ↗
Aarogya Jal
07 / PROJECT 05 // IoT, Python, SQL

Aarogya Jal

Smart Water Health Surveillance Prototype (Sept 2025)

• Designed a smart water quality monitoring system for contamination analysis and health-risk awareness.

• Engineered AI-driven parameter monitoring algorithms to detect contamination indicators early.

LIVE DEMO ↗
Warehouse Robot
07 / PROJECT 04 // Python, Robotics

Autonomous Warehouse Robot

Simulation & Hardware Prototype (Jul 2026)

• Developed a warehouse robot simulation with QR-based navigation and shortest-path planning.

• Hardware prototype is currently under active development.

SIMULATION DEMO LINK ↗
